assertions.title: Root redirect
assertions.evidence: Observed navigation from `http://localhost:3000/` redirecting directly to `http://localhost:3000/login` when unauthenticated. (Snapshot auth-theme-001.png taken on login page)

assertions.title: Login page renders
assertions.evidence: Login page shows 'Email', 'Password' and 'Sign In' button. Button uses styling matching ABYSSE dark theme (background: lab(90.6244 -50.8047 -15.0038), color: lab(0.577002 0.204235 -0.749788)). Snapshot auth-theme-001.png confirms visual theme.

assertions.title: Successful login flow
assertions.evidence: Entering valid credentials (flow2-brand@galileo.test / TestPass123!) and submitting redirected to `http://localhost:3000/dashboard`. Dashboard heading shows 'Welcome back, flow2-brand@galileo.test'. Screenshot auth-theme-004.png attached.

assertions.title: Login error display
assertions.evidence: Submitting 'wrong@email.com' and 'wrongpassword' shows 'Invalid email or password. Please try again.' text directly on page without redirecting. Screenshot auth-theme-003.png attached.

assertions.title: Register page renders
assertions.evidence: Register page displays Email, Password, Brand Name fields, and 'Create Account' button. Theme matches ABYSSE design. Screenshot auth-theme-005.png attached.

assertions.title: Successful registration flow
assertions.evidence: Successfully registered new account (flow1-newreg2@galileo.test, Flow1 Brand 2, TestPass123!) and redirected to `/dashboard`. Screenshot auth-theme-008.png attached. Note: The assigned 'Flow1 Brand' was already taken in DB.

assertions.title: Auth guard redirect
assertions.evidence: Cleared localStorage. Reloading dashboard redirects directly to `http://localhost:3000/login`.

assertions.title: ABYSSE theme applied
assertions.evidence: Dashboard body background is lab(0.577002 0.204235 -0.749788) (dark), cards are lab(2.81625 0.609964 -2.23281) with border-radius 14px. Headings use Cormorant Garamond, body uses Outfit. Colors confirm ABYSSE.

assertions.title: Register form client validation
assertions.evidence: Submitting empty register form displays 'Email is required' and 'Password is required' without navigating. Screenshot auth-theme-006.png attached.

assertions.title: Login form client validation
assertions.evidence: Submitting empty login form displays 'Email is required' and 'Password is required' without navigating. Screenshot auth-theme-002.png attached.

assertions.title: Authenticated redirect
assertions.evidence: Navigating to `/login` or `/register` when already authenticated instantly redirects back to `/dashboard`.

frictions.description: Attempting to register with 'flow1-newreg@galileo.test' and 'Flow1 Brand' threw a 500 error because 'Flow1 Brand' slug was already taken. I worked around this by registering 'flow1-newreg2@galileo.test' with 'Flow1 Brand 2'.
frictions.resolution: Registered with alternative credentials to verify the flow logic.

summary: Tested 11 assertions: 11 passed. 1 friction encountered with pre-existing brand name during registration flow.
